## 0.1.30 Highlights

1. Web settings now manage chat integrations in one place, with selectable Element/Matrix and DingTalk tools, local config saving, and secret-safe environment updates.
2. The AI model setup flow is easier to use: provider and model version choices are shown through dedicated pickers in both first-run setup and settings.
3. Web chat can now clear local browser chat history and restored job status when you want a fresh conversation view.
4. API-provider failures are clearer for operators. DeepSeek and compatible upstream errors such as insufficient balance or invalid API keys are reported directly instead of as a generic configuration problem.
5. The public GitHub Pages site now includes a blog, a shareable launch article, and stronger social preview metadata for links shared on external platforms.
6. The GitHub Actions release build now uses Gradle 9.5.1 so Fabric Loom 1.16.2 can package the universal Fabric jar correctly.

Download the universal Fabric jar from the assets below and place it in the Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.8 Fabric instance's `mods/` directory. Keep Fabric API installed in the same instance.

Full Changelog: https://github.com/mari0w/blockwright/compare/v0.1.28...v0.1.30
